steps: Add reaction components into sterile, nuclease-free tube on ice in the indicated order: %s %s Template RNA 100 ng ( 1pg - 5 µg) Random Hexamer 1 µl (100 pmol) dNTP Mix 1 µl (final concentration) Water, nuclease-free to 14.5 µl

Optional: If the RNA template is GC-rich or is known to contain secondary structures, mix gently, centrifuge briefly and incubate at 65 °C for 5min. Chill on ice, briefly centrifuge again and place on ice ice.
%s %s 10 min 25 °C 30 min 50 °C (For GC-rich RNA, the reaction temperature can be increased to 65 °C) 5 min 85 °C
The cDNA product is now ready for downstream applications
creator: Ben Kuipers
